title: Getting Real
description: The first book from 37signals — a smarter, faster way to build a successful web application. Written 20 years ago, still holds up.

title: Jab, Jab, Jab, Right Hook
description: Gary Vee's framework for social media marketing — give value 100 times (jabs), then occasionally ask for the sale (right hook).

title: Maverick
description: The story of how Ricardo Semler turned his father's Brazilian manufacturing company into a radically democratic workplace. A blueprint for running a company by your own rules.

title: Rework
description: A manifesto for a new way of working — shorter, simpler, and more productive. Written by the founders of 37signals/Basecamp.

title: Think and Grow Rich
